extra.message: User-controlled 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via Jinja2.from_string('Welcome ' + username + '!'). This allows an attacker to inject Jinja2 template expressions (e.g., {{ 7*7 }}, {{ config }}, or {{ ''.__class__.__mro__[1].__subclasses__() }}) which will be evaluated server-side, leading to arbitrary code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Templating Engine
CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code
